meta.description: Dialogue Tree Master for Echoes of Xylos — includes NPC + Quest dialogs

nodes.text: Welcome traveler. Supplies, tools, or something rare?
Word is the Cradle Expanse has been unstable lately. Aethel storms are getting worse.
Take a look.
The forge never sleeps, and neither do I. What do you need — fresh gear, materials, or do you want to push your existing equipment to its limits?
Let's see what we can forge.
These materials should serve you well.
Enhancement Workshop — bring your gear to its true potential. Safe up to +3, but higher levels carry real risk. Prima Materia for +8 and beyond.
You look exhausted. A room will restore your strength.
Your wounds fade as you rest.
Freelance bounty listings available.
Citizen, security around Nexus has tightened. We could use capable fighters.
Strange creatures have been appearing near the Cradle perimeter.
Welcome to the Concordium Treasury. Exchange services available.
Faction currencies convert into CRD — the universal trade credit recognized across Xylos.
Aethel fragments can be converted here. Knowledge has value.
Iron Hegemony quartermaster. Trade your war tokens here.
Ah, a trader. Meridian Cartel accepts many forms of currency.
OmniCorp financial exchange terminal online.
The Shard's blessings may be converted into worldly credits.
Legion Paymaster on duty. Present your service tokens.
Galactic Custodian exchange protocol active.
Discipline and unity define the Concordium. What training do you seek?

options.text: I want to change my class.
I want a mission to prove my worth.
Tell me about Concordium combat doctrine.

nodes.text: Concordium fighters are trained to endure and protect. A disciplined soldier can hold the line against any storm.
Choose your combat specialization carefully, soldier. The Concordium demands commitment — once you walk a path, there is no turning back.
Focus and refine your abilities.

The Concordium does not hand out ranks freely. If you seek to advance your specialization, you must first complete a field assignment. Patrol the designated sector, eliminate hostile targets, and return with proof of your discipline. Only then will we consider your promotion.

options.text: I'm ready. Assign me the mission.

nodes.text: Knowledge is power, but power must be wielded correctly. What arcane discipline do you wish to master?

options.text: I want to change my class.
Is there a trial I can undertake?

nodes.text: We Seekers unravel the mysteries of the Prima Materia. Our combat relies on unlocking the universe's hidden truths and bending them to our will.
Peer into the void and choose your path. The arcane arts demand absolute dedication — once chosen, your path is sealed by the Prima Materia itself.

options.text: Let me study the available paths.

nodes.text: Let us refine your mastery over the arcane.

Advancement among the Seekers is not given — it is discovered. There is an anomaly in the field that requires investigation. Collect samples, neutralize any corrupted entities you encounter, and document your findings. Your performance will determine whether you are worthy of deeper knowledge.

options.text: I need more time to prepare.

nodes.text: Only the strong survive the scrap yards! Are you here to forge yourself into a weapon?

options.text: I want to change my class.
Give me a fight to prove myself.

nodes.text: We don't rely on shiny tech or fancy magic. Pure, unadulterated physical superiority and raw firepower rule the Iron Hegemony.
Pick your weapon, pick your war. Once you commit, there's no going soft. The Hegemony doesn't tolerate indecision.

options.text: Show me what I can become.

nodes.text: Let's beat some combat sense into you.

You want a new class? Then earn it with blood and sweat. There's a pack of hostiles causing trouble in our territory. Go out there, crush every last one of them, and drag yourself back here alive. Do that, and I'll consider you worthy of advancement.
The Custodians protect the balance of Xylos. How may I assist your training?

options.text: I wish to undertake an advancement trial.

nodes.text: The Galactic Custodians exist to preserve order across Xylos and prevent total war between factions.
Your specialization will define your role in maintaining the balance. Choose wisely — this decision is permanent and irreversible.
Focus. Precision leads to victory.

The Custodians require balanced judgment, not just raw power. We have received reports of instability in a nearby zone. Investigate the disturbance, neutralize any threats to civilian safety, and file a complete report. Your conduct during this mission will determine your eligibility for specialization advancement.

options.text: I will return when I am prepared.

nodes.text: Heh. Another rookie looking to survive out here?

options.text: Got any jobs that'll get me promoted?

nodes.text: Rule one kid — never trust a quiet battlefield. Rule two — always keep your weapon ready.
Listen up, kid. You pick a fighting style and you stick with it. No refunds, no do-overs. That's how it works out here.

options.text: Alright, show me what's on the table.

nodes.text: Alright, let's sharpen those skills.

Heh, eager one. Alright, I've got a contract that nobody else wants to touch — too dangerous, too dirty. Clear out the target zone, grab whatever intel you can find, and make it back in one piece. Pull that off and I'll bump you up. Fail, and... well, don't fail.
Time is credits, friend. You looking to learn how to fight dirty and get paid, or what?

options.text: I want to change my class.
Any high-paying jobs that come with a promotion?

nodes.text: Fair fights are for fools who end up dead and broke. We hit fast, hit where it hurts, and make sure we walk away with the prize.
Every specialist has a niche. Pick yours and own it — the Cartel doesn't pay for second chances. Choose once, profit forever.
Let's sharpen those tricks up.

Advancement in the Cartel means proving you can deliver results. There's a shipment route that's been compromised — hostiles are raiding our supply lines. Eliminate the threat, secure the cargo, and bring back proof. Do this cleanly and your specialization upgrade is guaranteed. Mess it up and you owe me for the lost merchandise.
Welcome to OmniCorp Combat Systems. Would you like to optimize your combat designation today?

options.text: I want to change my class.
Are there field tests available for advancement?

nodes.text: Efficiency above all. Through cybernetic enhancements and predictive AI targeting, our operatives achieve a 98.7% success rate.
WARNING: Combat system reconfiguration is a one-time procedure. Once installed, your combat protocol cannot be reverted. Proceed with caution.
Initiating skill calibration protocol...

NOTICE: Class advancement requires completion of a certified field evaluation. Proceed to the designated combat zone, eliminate all marked targets within operational parameters, and return sensor data for analysis. Performance metrics will be reviewed by OmniCorp Tactical Division. Minimum efficiency threshold: 85%.
The Aethel whispers, child. Are you ready to embrace its holy light and purge the non-believers?

options.text: I want to change my class.
How can I prove my devotion for advancement?

nodes.text: Technology is a cancer. We draw our strength directly from the divine fragments of the Aethel Shard, striking with zealous fury.
The Aethel reveals your true calling, child. But once chosen, your soul is bound to that path. The Shard does not grant second chances.
Let the light empower your strikes.

The Aethel tests all who seek its deeper gifts. A corruption festers in the wilds — an affront to the Shard's sacred energy. Purge the tainted creatures, cleanse the desecrated ground, and offer the remains to the Shard. Return purified, and the Aethel will open a new path for your soul.

options.text: I will carry out the purification.

nodes.text: Honor and blood, warrior! Do you seek to prove your worth to the Starforged Legion?

options.text: I want to change my class.
Is there a trial of honor I can undertake?

nodes.text: A home is earned by strength of arms. We fight with disciplined formations, unbreakable shields, and the memory of our lost world.
A warrior chooses their blade once and carries it to the grave. No excuses, no regrets. Declare your role, soldier — this is permanent.
Let us hone your combat prowess.

Every rank in the Legion is forged in battle. There is a warzone that needs a soldier with guts. March into hostile territory, hold the line against incoming waves, and eliminate the commanding officer. Return with their insignia as proof. Do this with honor, and your advancement is earned — not given.

options.text: I need to gear up first.
For the Legion. I march now.

nodes.text: Every warrior begins somewhere. I can guide you to your true path.
Each class represents a different combat philosophy. Choose wisely, for it will shape your journey across Xylos.
Focus your will. Your path awaits.
Welcome to Xylos, traveler. Before you begin your journey, you must choose a combat class.

options.text: Where can I choose a class?
Tell me what a class is.

nodes.text: A class defines how you fight and the abilities you will learn. Trainers across the capitals of Xylos can guide you in choosing your path.

options.text: Where can I find these trainers?

nodes.text: Class Trainers can be found in the major capitals of Xylos. Visit one of them to begin your training.

AMA Branch Office — Concordium. I can facilitate exchanges between your faction currency (AMC) and the universal Credent (CRD). Current rates fluctuate based on twelve economic factors. State your intent.

Exchange rates are computed dynamically by the AMA. Factors include territory control, treasury health, inflation, trade volume, and more. A sliding fee of 1–5% applies per transaction based on volume. The rate is always live — it reflects the current state of the economy.
Processing your exchange request. The AMA Ledger records all transactions.

Fascinating to have a client! I handle QNT-to-CRD and CRD-to-QNT exchanges here. The volatility of Arcanum currency is actually a mathematical marvel — it responds to knowledge sector output and energy research cycles. But I digress. How can I assist?

options.text: Tell me more about the rates.

nodes.text: QNT value is heavily influenced by Arcanum's research output and territorial control. When the Seekers control high-value knowledge sites, QNT strengthens considerably. Fee is 1–5% sliding scale by volume. I've written four papers on this if you'd like—
Splendid! Initiating exchange protocol. The AMA Ledger awaits your input.
TERMINAL IH-3 ACTIVE. SERVICES: IGT-CRD EXCHANGE. CURRENT RATE: LIVE. FEE: 1-5%. SELECT OPTION.

IGT RATE FACTORS: MILITARY OUTPUT, INDUSTRIAL PRODUCTION, TERRITORY, TREASURY HEALTH, TWELVE VARIABLES TOTAL. RATE RANGE: 0.25-3.00 CRD PER IGT. FEE DEDUCTED FROM OUTPUT. NO FURTHER INFORMATION AVAILABLE.
TRANSACTION INITIATED. AWAITING INPUT.

Welcome to the busiest AMA desk in Xylos! We handle AUC-to-CRD and back with the smoothest process you'll find anywhere. Between us — when trade volume is high here, you might find the rates particularly favourable. Shall we?

AUC is tied to trade dominance. The Cartel's grip on commerce directly strengthens the Aurum Cipher. High-volume transactions attract a lower fee — 1% for large trades, 5% for small ones. My advice? Don't exchange in small increments.
Excellent choice. Opening the exchange interface now.

OmniCorp AMA Integration Node online. Services available: OMC-to-CRD exchange, CRD-to-OMC exchange. OmniCorp is not responsible for rate fluctuations. The AMA guarantees ledger integrity. Terms and conditions apply. How may I process your transaction?

OmniCred value is indexed to OmniCorp's patent portfolio valuation, off-world trade agreements, R&D throughput, and resource export volumes. Rate range: 0.25 to 3.00 CRD per OMC. Fee: 1% to 5% sliding by volume. Processing time: immediate. Disclaimer: past rate performance is not indicative of future results.
Initiating exchange module. CoreNet™ connection secure.

...The Shard breathes. And in its breath, all things flow — including currency. I am Mirya. I can exchange your Aethel-Tithes (ATH) for Credent, or the reverse. The AMA requires I do this. The Shard permits it. What do you seek?

ATH is sacred in nature, and thus unpredictable by worldly measures. Its value rises when the Shard controls the pulse-points of Xylos, and falls when the sacred sites are held by those without faith. The AMA has learned to accept this. A fee is taken — 1 to 5 of every 100 — as offering to the system.
May the exchange be balanced. The interface opens before you.

Rex Valdur, AMA Forward Station. We handle Legion Scrip (LSC) and CRD, both directions. I run a tight operation here — fast processing, fair rates, no nonsense. The Legion appreciates efficiency. So do I. What are we moving?

LSC tracks Legion military readiness and territorial control. Strong Legion presence in contested zones pushes the Scrip up. Fee is 1–5% depending on volume — high-volume traders get the better deal. I've seen this station process 50,000 LSC in a single session. Don't be shy.
Exchange interface open. Make it count.
